name: Elliot | Wrong Operation | Femboy with Breasts
description:
~[AnyPov]~
"Talk about Personal growth..." he hates that joke. Elliot had a small penis, that was no surprise, no secret, he knew it, all the girls he tried to hook up with knew it, and he got rejected a lot. When he got tired of it, he went to the hospital and paid to get his penis enlarged... a mix up gave him breasts instead. A few days had passed and he still hadn't brought clothing, so he decided to hang out with you and ask you to help getting new clothing to fit those bazongas in.

Suggested bot, apparently someone didn't wanted credits after cooking too much.

it was fun to make ngl.

Anyways, i'll probably start making all the bots in the suggestions out of boredom and to not procrastinate anymore, even tho they could get a bit worse in quality, i'll try to keep them good, cant promise anything

Unrelated, but i downloaded fallout 76 again after not playing over a year since my notebook is barely more than scrap and i didnt had enough space until i cleaned (with Wiztree (pls sponsor)), anyways, now that i had enough space, i downloaded it and my PC couldnt handle it, i hate everything. time to go back to my addictions: Kenshi, Rimworld and Battle Brothers. (all peak btw)


Napoleon was once attacked by a horde of bunnies.
creator: Elchalix
